mealer-alexandra.text: Alexandra Mealer (Republican) is a candidate for U.S. Representative, TX-09.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Alexandra Mealer had raised $1,770,301 and spent $1,355,775 for this campaign.
No public voting record in our set for Alexandra Mealer (not currently a member of Congress).

ivey-r.text: R. Todd Dr. Ivey (Democratic) is a candidate for U.S. Representative, TX-09.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show R. Todd Dr. Ivey had raised $192,630 and spent $176,088 for this campaign.
No public voting record in our set for R. Todd Dr. Ivey (not currently a member of Congress).

morales-roy.text: Roy Morales (IND) is a candidate for U.S. Representative, TX-09.
As of 2026-07-04, FEC records show Roy Morales had raised $5,008 and spent $1,226 for this campaign.
No public voting record in our set for Roy Morales (not currently a member of Congress).

green-al.text: Al Green (Democrat) is the current officeholder running for U.S. Representative, TX-09.
No public FEC campaign finance data in our set for Al Green.

On 7-Jan-2025, Al Green voted Nay on H R 29. A Yea vote required federal detention of unauthorized immigrants charged with theft, burglary, larceny, or assaulting a law enforcement officer, and let state attorneys general sue the federal government over certain immigration enforcement decisions.

base.summary: This is the U.S. House race for TX-09. In the most recent election (2024-11-05), Al Green (DEM) won by about 100.0 points out of 184141 votes cast. The bullets below summarize each current candidate's public finance and voting-record data where available.
caveats: This summary only includes facts found in our sourced dataset (FEC finance filings and U.S. House Clerk roll-call votes). It omits anything we could not verify from those sources.
No public data in our set on any candidate's policy positions for this race (the positions field was empty for every candidate as of this build).
No public data in our set on Al Green's policy positions.
No public data in our set on Alexandra Mealer's policy positions.
No public data in our set on R. Todd Dr. Ivey's policy positions.
No public data in our set on Roy Morales's policy positions.
